query:
-- Infinitea entries
SELECT octaneCustomerId, octaneCustomerName, octaneServiceName, internalCustomerExternalId, internalCustomerName, matchType, matchConfidence
FROM octane_customer_links
WHERE octaneCustomerName LIKE '%Infinitea%' OR octaneCustomerName LIKE '%Little Cha%'
ORDER BY octaneServiceName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Infinitea entries
SELECT octaneCustomerId, octaneCustomerName, octaneServiceName, internalCustomerExternalId, internalCustomerName, matchType, matchConfidence
FROM octane_customer_links
WHERE octaneCustomerName LIKE '%Infinitea%' OR octaneCustomerName LIKE '%Little Cha%'
ORDER BY octaneServiceName;
